mapper.select: SELECT lba.id AS accountId, im.company_name AS bankName, lba.account_name AS accountName, lba.balance AS balance, lba.currency AS currency FROM linked_bank_accounts lba JOIN linked_institutions li ON li.id = lba.institution_id JOIN institution_master im ON im.id = li.institution_master_id WHERE lba.user_id = #{userId} AND lba.is_dormant = TRUE ORDER BY lba.balance DESC, lba.id ASC
